pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh which calls setup_task_project with "classify_sensitive_project", resulting in a double "_project" suffix due to logic in scripts/task_utils.sh.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which sets SRS_FILE relative to PROJECT_DIR and verifier.py which evaluates srs_path accordingly.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where target IDs are written to this path and verifier.py loading it from here.
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which injects this attribute and verifier.py which asserts the value.
Code analysis of task description and verifier.py which grants points if the attribute matches this target value.

privileged_info_summary: The actual workspace project path is /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/classify_sensitive_project_project, contradicting the metadata due to a double-suffix script error. The requirements are located in documents/SRS.json within the project folder. The setup script dynamically injects random synthetic IPv4 addresses into a random subset of requirements and records the ground truth target IDs at /var/lib/reqview/ground_truth.json. The target attribute to modify is DataClassification and the expected value is 'Confidential', which are added to the project.json by the setup script and checked by the verifier.
